name: st-yuzi-phone
description: 玉子手机 - SillyTavern 扩展

scripts.tables:split: node scripts/table-source.cjs split docs/reference/小剧场2.1.json tables/sources/小剧场2.1
scripts.tables:check: node scripts/table-source.cjs check tables/sources/小剧场2.1 && node scripts/table-source.cjs check tables/sources/纪要
scripts.tables:build: node scripts/table-source.cjs build tables/sources/小剧场2.1 tables/generated/小剧场2.1.json && node scripts/table-source.cjs build tables/sources/纪要 tables/generated/纪要.json
